description:
🔥Fabric + Raycast — Will Chen shows how to integrate Fabric into Raycast! Very cool. I’m adding this myself, forcing me to switch back to Raycast. In fact, I think I might integrate it more deeply by hosting a set of these scripts within Fabric, so you can just point Raycast to that directory!
